description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a natural wood grain finish, featuring a single set of two drawers on the right side. The desktop is spacious and currently holds a blue and white desk lamp, a green water bottle, a red spiral notebook with white pages, and a blue pen. The desk has sturdy, straight legs and a modesty panel at the front, providing both stability and privacy. The drawers have round white knobs, suggesting easy access for storage. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for a variety of work or study environments. The surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A wooden desk with two right-side drawers, a clean wood grain finish, and a spacious top holding a lamp, bottle, notebook, and pen. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the modesty panel, desktop items, and the left side of the desk.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the water bottle, lamp, and the thickness of the desktop.
description_view_2: Back view revealing the two drawers with white knobs and the open leg space beneath the desk.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the lamp, notebook, and the solid side panel.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the modesty panel and open leg space, with drawers on the right, indicating the front of the desk.
